tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij poniższe wypowiedzi (1.1.–1.6.), wybierając spośród podanych możliwości. Zakreśl literę A, B albo C.

items.prompt: He always manages to put his _______ in it and say the wrong thing at the wrong moment.
Keep an _______ on your little brother while I'm out shopping, please.
She found the new job by _______ of mouth — her friend told her about it.
The teacher turned a blind _______ to the students talking quietly at the back.
I know this city like the back of my _______. I grew up here.
She had to _______ her tongue and not say what she really thought about his cooking.
